title: Sum from 1 to N
description: Ask for a number N. Use a for loop with range() to calculate the sum of all numbers from 1 to N. Print the result.
starterCode:
n = int(input("Enter N: "))
total = 0

# Use a for loop to sum 1 to N
solution:
n = int(input("Enter N: "))
total = 0
for i in range(1, n + 1):
    total += i
print(f"Sum: {total}")

title: Factorial Calculator
description: Ask for a number N. Calculate N! (N factorial) using a for loop. N! = 1 * 2 * 3 * ... * N
starterCode:
n = int(input("Enter N: "))
fact = 1

# Calculate factorial
solution:
n = int(input("Enter N: "))
fact = 1
for i in range(1, n + 1):
    fact *= i
print(f"Factorial: {fact}")
